name: @vdhsn/harmonica
description: Symphony-spec orchestrator for Claude Code + Linear

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,ui -c blue,magenta "bun run dev:server" "bun run dev:ui"
scripts.build:ui: cd ui && bun install && bunx vite build
scripts.build:server: bun build src/index.ts --target bun --packages external --splitting --outdir dist --format esm --banner '#!/usr/bin/env bun'
scripts.build: bun run build:server && bun run build:ui
